title: Operations — Detective Services Disabled / Routes Broken
description: An engineer wires up GuardDuty + Inspector v2 + Access Analyzer + Cost Anomaly Detection through `DetectiveServicesEnable` (M8), but the EventBridge route to MonitoringFoundation's SNS topic was never tested end-to-end. KEV findings (CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities) flow through the primary topic instead of a pager-targeted secondary topic — the M8 dual-routing path. Threats focus on detection gaps and the route that exists in IaC but doesn't actually deliver.
actors: On-call SRE (consumer of the SNS topic)
assets: Inspector v2 KEV findings (CISA-tagged code vulnerabilities)
MonitoringFoundation SNS topic ARNs (primary + KEV pager)

stride.name: Spoofed EventBridge target
stride.description: An attacker with `events:PutTargets` permission can swap the SNS target on the primary route, redirecting findings to an attacker-controlled topic. Mitigation: SCP-style guardrails on `events:PutTargets` in production accounts; EventBridge target ARNs are visible in CloudTrail.

stride.name: Tampered Inspector v2 enabler — partial coverage
stride.description: An attacker (or careless author) reconfigures `aws.inspector2.Enabler.resourceTypes` to drop LAMBDA. Lambda-layer CVEs go undetected. Mitigation: `O_INSPECTOR_1` (M10) refuses partial coverage at preview; suppression with reason is auditable.

stride.name: Repudiation via KEV findings buried in primary topic
stride.description: Without `findingsKevRoutingSnsArn`, KEV (Known Exploited) findings are interleaved with low-priority Inspector findings on the primary topic. On-call rotation skims past the KEV alert. Mitigation: M8 dual routing pattern + the typed `kevDualRoutingActive: Output<true>` operator-confirmation flag.

stride.name: Information disclosure via Cost Anomaly to wrong subscriber
stride.description: Cost Anomaly Subscriptions specify the SNS topic in plain text. A misconfigured subscriber reveals service-level cost patterns to the wrong tenant. Mitigation: `findingsRoutingSnsArn` is required (no default); KMS encryption on the SNS topic is the consumer's responsibility.

stride.name: Denial via Access Analyzer disabled in a fresh account
stride.description: Newly-onboarded accounts that skip `enableAccessAnalyzer: true` have no external-access analyzer. Mitigation: M8 default-on flag.

stride.name: Elevation via unmonitored cross-account assume-role
stride.description: Without Access Analyzer, cross-account assume-role chains accumulate without external-access review. Mitigation: M8's Access Analyzer + the `IdentityAlarms.iam-role-policy-change` event firing on every assume-role-policy edit.

abuseCases.title: Detective EventBridge route exists in IaC but is never delivered
abuseCases.description: Mitigation: real-AWS sandbox integration test (deferred from M8); periodic delivery probe.

abuseCases.title: KEV findings buried in the primary topic
